rationale: The DeepSeek candidate provided a much cleaner and more natural Arabic translation. It correctly handled the technical terms and maintained the author's direct, conversational style. The GPT-based candidate had several typos (e.g., 'بككذبة' in the title, 'that هو' in the text) and inconsistent formatting. DeepSeek also correctly updated the asset paths to use '../' as required by the instructions.
